title: Prosecuted
description: Dark Souls themed Modpack with a progression system.
body:
NOTE: I would reccomend getting the curseforge version due to it having more content not avalible on here: [Prosecuted](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/prosecuted/files/7217490)

**Summary:**

Prosecuted contains 12 Dimensions and dozens of bosses to make a unique playstyle and builds off of the combat system of Epic Fight. The Modpack is very optimized but still keeps core quality features. The progression consists of 5 chapters each in different dimensions and each build up to a final boss. Prosecuted also features a huge range of video settings with shaders like Kappa, Bliss, and Makeup Ultrafast for weaker PC's, but can be scaled down to work with weak laptops.

**Recomendations:**
- I would allow 4-6 gigs of RAM as a minimal and anything above that as good.
- If not already on turn on all recourse packs listed in the modpack screen once you downloaded the mod for extra quality at no cost. Any other recourse pack in the recourse pack menu is 100% optional and is just there if you want it.
- If your not good with keep inventory off in other modpacks or minecraft in general I would highly reccomend keeping it on because losing 30+ hours of stuff to a random boss would suck.
- I wouldn't bother with config's too much but anything acessible in the create world menu (Expect Data Packs) are ok to play with (Not enforced but reccomended).
- If you happen to find a bug or weird problem with the modpack at anytime feel free to comment it in the modpack here. I will open up a discord for this at some point.
- If your PC can handle it putting on shaders is highly reccomended. All shaders work with all dimensions and they don't bother with how you see in the dark. Even some shaders like Makeup Ultrafast will light up better with night vision on.

**Info:**
- The whole mod version is Forge 1.20.1 and will try to stick to whatever latest version of Forge exists.
- Like in the 2nd to last reccomendation any discord, Wiki, or media app arent made yet but will be WIP. So far I have a YT that doesn't have Prosecuted related content yet (Sub anyways and yes I suck at editing) and a planned version on modrinth which should be the exact same and should release very very soon. If I make a patreon all donations will go to a PC I will build because at the moment I'm doing this in Integrated Graphics :(
- I measured the entire playtime to be anywhere from 40-75 hours which will usually speed up on the second or third etc playthroughs.
- Yes this bio will update alot where I will add Q/A's and more pictures of the modpack.
  For Modrinth purposes only:
Luminous Nether (V1.3.1 – Forge 1.20.1)
